title: CAMPS - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers summer and school-break camps for children and youth. Financial aid for a 25%-50% discount to camps for prequalified children. 1865 Bill Frey Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 4-12 Hours: Varies by camp program Email (503) 798-4814 ... Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 798-4814 Camp Supervisor Kimberly Landers [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Camps: Call or visit website for registration information Financial Aid: Walk in to sign up at front desk. Ask for "Camps Program Scholarship." FEES: Varies by camp program. Discount for early registration. DOCUMENTS: Financial Aid: Proof of benefits including Medicaid, SNAP, TANF, or ERDC programs. Other federal programs such as SSI, SSD, or HeadStart may also qualify you for a scholarship. AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday 7am-9pm, Sunday 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cherriots bus routes 3, 11, 23 Services: Camps Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Student Financial Aid Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ARTS & EDUCATION LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - FITNESS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING FACILITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS
